text: Hello, I hope you can help me. I've been trying to use the application for a while now, but it keeps crashing unexpectedly. I don't really know why this is happening, and I haven’t changed anything on my end. Can you please assist me in figuring out what's going wrong? There’s no error message popping up, just a blank screen after I try to log in. It’s quite frustrating, honestly, because I rely on this app for my daily tasks.
I'm really frustrated because the app keeps crashing every time I try to save my progress! Please help!
can't log in, my password doesn't work, maybe I forgot?
I’m so frustrated! My app keeps crashing, but when I restart my phone, it seems fine. Why does it keep happening? I just want it to work without all these issues!
I'm really confused about the new features you added. Can someone help clarify how they work? I feel lost and want to make the most of it.
Could you please clarify the specific criteria for eligibility in your loyalty program?

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the delay in receiving my order, which was promised within a specified timeframe. Unfortunately, it has exceeded the expected delivery date without any communication from your end.
i tried to cancle my subscripshun but its still charging me! pls refund asap.
I seem to be having some issues with my account, and I'm not quite sure what the problem is. Could you please help me resolve this?

Hello, I hope you're doing well. I wanted to bring to your attention that I placed an order last week, and the website indicated it would arrive within a couple of days. However, it has now been over a week, and I have yet to see any updates or receive my package. I was really looking forward to using the items for a family event that is now just a few days away. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
hey, i was charged for something, but i didn’t want it. just need a refund, plz help!!
What do you mean by saying my order was canceled? I don’t remember cancelling it, but I got an email about it.
My app keeps crashing, but it's not the app, it's definitely my phone that has the problem. Can you fix it?
I can’t log into my account anymore. I think someone changed my password.

I can’t seem to log into my account, even though I remember my password perfectly! I tried resetting it just in case, but I did that yesterday and I'm sure the password is right. This is really frustrating because I need access to my account for a work project, and I've never had troubles like this before, so maybe it’s something with your system? Can someone please help me out here?
I believe my account is still active although I received an email stating it has been deactivated. Can you clarify what's happening? I think I should still have access.
